project: Joint State-of-Charge and State-of-Health Estimation for Battery Management Systems Using MATLAB/Simulink
notes: Developed a combined State-of-Charge (SOC) and State-of-Health (SOH) estimation system using MATLAB and Simulink.
Implemented an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) on a 12V, 7Ah lead-acid battery model.
Improved estimation and tracking accuracy under varying operating conditions.
Addressed modelling uncertainties through adaptive state estimation techniques.
Gained practical experience in battery modelling, simulation, and estimation algorithms for Battery Management Systems (BMS).
